articles.title_en: On the Optimal Design of a Financial Stability Fund
articles.title_cn: 关于金融稳定基金的最优设计
articles.abstract_en: Abstract We develop a model of a Financial Stability Fund (the “Fund” henceforth) for a union of sovereign countries. By design, the contract prevents country defaults, as well as undesired expected losses, which in a union translate into excessive risk mutualizations. A participant country has greater ability to borrow and share risks than using sovereign debt financing. The Fund contract also provides better incentives for the country to reduce endogenous risks. These efficiency gains arise from the ability of the Fund to offer long-term contingent financial contracts, subject to limited enforcement and moral hazard constraints. We develop the theory and quantitatively compare the constrained-efficient Fund economy with an incomplete markets economy with default. We calibrate our economy to the euro area “stressed countries” in the debt crisis (2010–2). Substantial welfare gains are achieved, particularly in times of crisis. The Fund is, in fact, a risk-sharing, crisis prevention and resolution mechanism, which transforms the participant countries’ defaultable sovereign debt into the union’s safe assets. In sum, our theory can help to improve current official lending practices and, for example, to eventually design a European Fiscal Fund.
articles.abstract_cn: 摘要 我们为一组主权国家联盟构建了一个金融稳定基金（以下简称“基金”）的模型。通过设计，基金合同能够防止成员国违约以及不希望出现的预期损失，这些损失在联盟内部表现为过度的风险共担。与主权债务融资相比，参与国通过基金能够获得更强的借款能力和风险分担能力。基金合同还为成员国提供了更好的激励，以降低内生性风险。这些效率提升源于基金能够在有限执行力和道德风险约束下，提供长期的或有金融合同。我们发展了相关理论，并将受约束的有效基金经济与存在违约的非完全市场经济进行了定量比较。我们将模型校准至欧元区债务危机期间（2010–2）“受压力国家”的数据。结果显示，特别是在危机时期，可以实现显著的福利增益。事实上，基金是一种风险共担、危机预防与解决机制，能够将成员国的可违约主权债务转化为联盟的安全资产。总之，我们的理论有助于改进当前的官方贷款实践，并可为未来设计如欧洲财政基金等机制提供理论基础。

articles.title_en: Temporal-Difference Estimation of Dynamic Discrete Choice Models
articles.title_cn: 时序差分估计动态离散选择模型
articles.abstract_en: Abstract We study the use of Temporal-Difference learning for estimating the structural parameters in dynamic discrete choice models. Our algorithms are based on the conditional choice probability approach but use functional approximations to estimate various terms in the pseudo-log-likelihood function. We suggest two approaches: The first—linear semi-gradient—provides approximations to the recursive terms using basis functions. The second—Approximate Value Iteration—builds a sequence of approximations to the recursive terms by solving non-parametric estimation problems. Our approaches are fast and naturally allow for continuous and/or high-dimensional state spaces. Furthermore, they do not require specification of transition densities. In dynamic games, they avoid integrating over other players’ actions, further heightening the computational advantage. Our proposals can be paired with popular existing methods such as pseudo-maximum-likelihood, and we propose locally robust corrections for the latter to achieve parametric rates of convergence. Monte Carlo simulations confirm the properties of our algorithms in practice.
articles.abstract_cn: 我们研究了时序差分学习在动态离散选择模型结构参数估计中的应用。我们的算法基于条件选择概率方法，但采用函数逼近来估计伪对数似然函数中的各项。我们提出了两种方法：第一种——线性半梯度——利用基函数对递归项进行逼近。第二种——近似值迭代——通过解决非参数估计问题，构建递归项的逼近序列。我们的方法速度快，并且自然适用于连续和/或高维状态空间。此外，它们不需要指定转移密度。在动态博弈中，这些方法避免了对其他参与者行为的积分，进一步提升了计算优势。我们的方案可以与现有的流行方法如伪最大似然结合，并提出了对后者的局部稳健修正，以实现参数收敛速度。蒙特卡洛模拟验证了我们的算法在实际中的性质。

articles.title_en: Demand Analysis under Latent Choice Constraints
articles.title_cn: 潜在选择约束下的需求分析
articles.abstract_en: Abstract Consumer choices are constrained in many markets due to either supply-side rationing or information frictions. Examples include matching markets for schools and colleges; entry-level labour markets; limited brand awareness and inattention in consumer markets; and selective admissions to healthcare services. We analyse a general random utility model for consumer preferences that allows for endogenous characteristics and a reduced-form choice-set formation rule that can be derived from models of the examples described above. We show non-parametric identification of this model, propose an estimator, and apply these methods to study admissions in the market for kidney dialysis in California. Our identification results require two sets of instruments, one that only affects consumer preferences and the other that only affects choice sets. We show that both instruments are necessary for identification. These results also suggest tests of choice-set constraints, which we apply to the dialysis market. We find that dialysis facilities are less likely to admit new patients when they have a higher-than-normal caseload and that patients are more likely to travel further when nearby facilities have high caseloads. Finally, we estimate consumers’ preferences and facilities’ rationing rules using a Gibbs sampler.
articles.abstract_cn: 摘要 在许多市场中，消费者选择受到供给侧配给或信息摩擦的约束。例子包括学校和大学的匹配市场、入门级劳动力市场、消费者市场中的品牌认知有限和注意力不足，以及医疗服务的选择性录取。我们分析了一个允许内生特征和可从上述例子模型推导出的简化选择集形成规则的一般随机效用模型。我们展示了该模型的非参数识别，提出了一个估计量，并将这些方法应用于加利福尼亚肾脏透析市场的录取研究。我们的识别结果需要两组工具变量，一组只影响消费者偏好，另一组只影响选择集。我们证明了两组工具变量对于识别都是必要的。这些结果还提出了选择集约束的检验，我们将其应用于透析市场。我们发现，当透析机构的病例负荷高于正常水平时，其录取新患者的可能性较低；而当附近机构病例负荷较高时，患者更可能选择更远的机构。最后，我们使用Gibbs采样器估计了消费者偏好和机构配给规则。

articles.title_en: Algorithmic Recommendations and Human Discretion
articles.title_cn: 算法推荐与人工裁量
articles.abstract_en: Abstract Human decision-makers frequently override the recommendations generated by predictive algorithms, but it is unclear whether these discretionary overrides add valuable private information or reintroduce human biases and mistakes. We develop new quasi-experimental tools to measure the impact of human discretion over an algorithm on the accuracy of decisions, even when the outcome of interest is only selectively observed, in the context of bail decisions. We find that 90% of the judges in our setting underperform the algorithm when they make a discretionary override, with most making override decisions that are no better than random. Yet the remaining 10% of judges outperform the algorithm in terms of both accuracy and fairness when they make a discretionary override. We provide suggestive evidence on the behaviour underlying these differences in judge performance, showing that the high-performing judges are more likely to use relevant private information and are less likely to overreact to highly salient events compared to the low-performing judges.
articles.abstract_cn: 人工决策者经常推翻预测算法生成的推荐，但这些裁量性推翻是否增加了有价值的私人信息，或重新引入了人为偏见和错误，尚不明确。我们开发了新的准实验工具，以衡量人工裁量对算法决策准确性的影响，即使感兴趣的结果仅被选择性观察，在保释决策的背景下。我们发现，在我们的设定中，90%的法官在进行裁量性推翻时表现不如算法，大多数法官的推翻决策与随机决策无异。然而，剩下的10%的法官在进行裁量性推翻时，无论在准确性还是公平性方面都优于算法。我们提供了关于法官绩效差异背后行为的初步证据，显示高绩效法官更可能使用相关的私人信息，并且相比低绩效法官更不容易对高度显著事件过度反应。

articles.title_en: The Surrogate Index: Combining Short-Term Proxies to Estimate Long-Term Treatment Effects More Rapidly and Precisely
articles.title_cn: 替代指标：结合短期代理变量以更快速和更精确地估计长期处理效应
articles.abstract_en: Abstract A common challenge in estimating the impact of interventions (e.g. job training programmes, educational programmes) is that many outcomes of interest (e.g. lifetime earnings or other labour market outcomes) are observed with a long delay. In biomedical settings, this is often addressed by using short-term outcomes as so-called “surrogates” for the outcome of interest, e.g. tumour size as a surrogate for mortality in cancer studies. We build on this literature by combining multiple, possibly qualitatively distinct, short-term outcomes (e.g. short-run earnings and employment indicators) systematically into a “surrogate index”. Under the Prentice surrogacy assumption, which requires that the primary outcome is independent of the treatment conditional on the surrogates, we show that the average treatment effect on the surrogate index equals the treatment effect on the long-term outcome. We also relate the surrogacy assumption to a set of structural, causal assumptions. We then characterize the bias that arises from violations of each of the key assumptions, and we provide simple methods to validate these assumptions using additional observed outcomes. We apply our method to analyse the long-term impacts of a multi-site job training experiment in California. Rather than waiting a full 9 years to directly observe the long-term impact, we show that it is possible to use short-term (the first six quarters) outcomes as surrogates. Given the surrogacy assumption one could have estimated the programme’s long-term impacts on mean employment rates using the employment rates observed in the first six quarters, with a 35% reduction in standard errors relative to a simple difference in means estimator based on all 9 years of data.
articles.abstract_cn: 摘要 在估计干预措施（如职业培训项目、教育项目）影响时，一个常见挑战是许多感兴趣的结果（如终身收入或其他劳动力市场结果）需要很长时间才能观察到。在生物医学领域，通常通过使用短期结果作为所谓的“替代变量”来解决这一问题，例如在癌症研究中用肿瘤大小作为死亡率的替代变量。我们基于相关文献，将多个可能在性质上不同的短期结果（如短期收入和就业指标）系统性地结合为一个“替代指标”。在 Prentice 替代假设下，即主要结果在给定替代变量条件下与处理无关，我们证明了替代指标上的平均处理效应等于长期结果上的处理效应。我们还将替代假设与一组结构性、因果性假设联系起来。随后，我们刻画了每个关键假设被违反时产生的偏差，并提供了利用额外观察到的结果来验证这些假设的简单方法。我们将该方法应用于分析加利福尼亚州一个多地点职业培训实验的长期影响。与直接观察长期影响需等待完整 9 年相比，我们展示了可以使用短期（前六个季度）结果作为替代变量。在替代假设成立的情况下，可以用前六个季度观察到的就业率来估计项目对平均就业率的长期影响，相较于基于全部 9 年数据的简单均值差异估计器，标准误减少了 35%。

articles.title_en: Demand Stimulus as Social Policy
articles.title_cn: 作为社会政策的需求刺激
articles.abstract_en: Abstract We exploit a panel of city-level data with rich demographic information to estimate the distributional effects of Department of Defense spending and its effects on a range of social outcomes. The income and employment generated by defence spending accrue predominantly to households without a bachelor's degree. These households as well as Black and Hispanic households tend to disproportionately benefit from this spending. Defence spending also promotes a range of beneficial social outcomes that are often targeted by government programs, including reductions in poverty, divorce rates, disability rates, and mortality rates, as well as increases in homeownership rates, health insurance rates, and occupational prestige. We compare the effects of defence spending with the effects of general demand shocks and explore reasons for the differential effects of the shocks.
articles.abstract_cn: 我们利用包含丰富人口统计信息的城市级面板数据，估算国防部支出的分布效应及其对一系列社会结果的影响。国防支出所产生的收入和就业主要流向没有学士学位的家庭。这些家庭以及黑人和西班牙裔家庭往往从该支出中获得较多益处。国防支出还促进了一系列通常由政府项目所关注的有益社会结果，包括贫困率、离婚率、残疾率和死亡率的降低，以及住房拥有率、健康保险覆盖率和职业声望的提升。我们将国防支出的效应与一般需求冲击的效应进行比较，并探讨冲击效应差异的原因。

articles.title_en: The Origins and Control of Forest Fires in the Tropics
articles.title_cn: 热带森林火灾的起源与控制
articles.abstract_en: Abstract Environmental externalities—uncompensated damages imposed on others—lie at the root of climate change, pollution, deforestation and biodiversity loss. Empirical evidence is limited, however, as to how externalities drive private decision making. We study one such behaviour, illegal tropical forest fires, using 15 years of daily satellite data covering over 107,000 fires across Indonesia. Weather-induced variation in fire spread risk and variation in who owns surrounding land allow us to identify how far externalities influence the decision to use fire. Relative to when all spread risks are internalized, we find that firms overuse fire when surrounded by unleased government lands where property rights are weak. In contrast, and consistent with the Coase Theorem, firms treat risks to nearby private concessions similarly to risks to their own land. Government sanctions, concentrated on fires spreading to populated areas, also deter fires, consistent with Pigouvian deterrence.
articles.abstract_cn: 环境外部性——对他人造成的未获补偿的损害——是气候变化、污染、森林砍伐和生物多样性丧失的根源。然而，关于外部性如何驱动私人决策的实证证据有限。我们利用覆盖印度尼西亚超过107,000起火灾、为期15年的每日卫星数据，研究了其中一种行为——非法热带森林火灾。火灾蔓延风险的天气诱致变化以及周边土地所有权的差异，使我们能够识别外部性在多大程度上影响使用火的决策。与所有蔓延风险均被内部化时相比，我们发现，当企业周围是未租赁的政府土地、产权薄弱时，企业过度使用火。而与科斯定理一致，企业对邻近私人特许权土地的风险处理方式与对自身土地的风险类似。政府制裁主要集中在蔓延至人口稠密地区的火灾，也能起到威慑作用，这与庇古式威慑一致。

articles.title_en: Repurchase Options in the Market for Lemons
articles.title_cn: “柠檬市场”中的回购期权
articles.abstract_en: Abstract We study repurchase options (repo contracts) in a competitive asset market with adverse selection. Gains from trade emerge from a liquidity need, but private information about asset quality prevents the full realization of trades. In equilibrium, a single repo contract pools all assets. The embedded repurchase option mitigates adverse selection by improving the volume of trades relative to outright sales. However, liquidity provision can be inefficiently low as lenders compete to attract high-quality assets via high haircuts and low rates. The equilibrium has a closed form and aligns well with empirical patterns across Mortgage-Backed Securities repos.
articles.abstract_cn: 摘要 我们研究了在存在逆向选择的竞争性资产市场中的回购期权（回购合约）。交易收益来源于流动性需求，但关于资产质量的私人信息阻碍了交易的完全实现。在均衡中，所有资产通过单一回购合约进行池化。嵌入的回购期权通过相较于直接出售提升交易量，从而缓解了逆向选择。然而，由于放贷人通过高保证金和低利率竞争以吸引高质量资产，流动性供给可能低于效率水平。均衡具有封闭解，并且与抵押贷款支持证券回购市场的实证特征高度一致。

articles.title_en: What Do Policies Value?
articles.title_cn: 政策重视什么？
articles.abstract_en: Abstract When a policy prioritizes one person over another, is it because they benefit more, or because they are preferred? This paper develops a method to uncover the values consistent with observed allocation decisions. We estimate how much each person benefits from an intervention, and then reconcile the allocation with (i) the welfare weights assigned to different people; (ii) heterogeneous treatment effects of the intervention; and (iii) weights on different outcomes. We demonstrate this approach by analyzing Mexico’s PROGRESA anti-poverty programme. The analysis reveals that while the programme prioritized certain subgroups—such as indigenous households—the fact that those groups benefited more implies that the programme did not actually assign them a higher welfare weight. We also find evidence that the policy valued outcomes differently from households. The PROGRESA case illustrates how the method makes it possible to audit existing policies, and to design future policies that better align with values.
articles.abstract_cn: 当一项政策优先考虑某个人而非另一个人时，是因为他们受益更多，还是因为他们被偏好？本文提出了一种方法，用于揭示与观察到的分配决策一致的价值观。我们估计每个人从干预中获得的收益，然后将分配与（i）分配给不同人的福利权重；（ii）干预的异质性处理效应；以及（iii）对不同结果的权重进行协调。我们通过分析墨西哥的PROGRESA反贫困项目来展示这一方法。分析结果显示，尽管该项目优先考虑了某些子群体——如土著家庭——但这些群体受益更多，意味着该项目实际上并未赋予他们更高的福利权重。我们还发现政策对结果的重视与家庭不同。PROGRESA案例说明该方法能够对现有政策进行审计，并设计更符合价值观的未来政策。

articles.title_en: Contract Terms, Employment Shocks, and Default in Credit Cards
articles.title_cn: 合同条款、就业冲击与信用卡违约
articles.abstract_en: Abstract Regulatory concerns over a tension between expanding financial access and limiting default have led to significant restrictions on contract terms in a number of countries, despite limited evidence on their effectiveness. We use a large nation-wide RCT to examine new borrower responses to changes in interest rates and minimum payments for a credit card that accounted for 15% of all first-time formal loans in Mexico. Default rates were 19% over the 26 month experiment and a 30 pp decrease in interest rates decreased default by 2.5 pp with no effects on the newest borrowers. Doubling minimum payments increased default by 0.8 pp during the experiment but reduced it by 1 pp afterwards, possibly by reducing debt. Matching the experimental sample to their formal employment histories we find that the effect of job separation—more common among new borrowers—on default is seven times larger than the effect of the 30 pp interest rate change. We provide a simple framework for interpreting the experimental results, and rationalize the smaller contract term effects by their limited effects on cash flow rather than by differences in per-peso impacts.
articles.abstract_cn: 监管部门对扩大金融可得性与限制违约之间的紧张关系表示担忧，尽管关于其有效性的证据有限，许多国家仍对合同条款进行了重大限制。我们利用一项覆盖全国的大型随机对照试验，考察了新借款人对利率和最低还款额变化的反应，该信用卡占墨西哥所有首次正式贷款的15%。在26个月的实验期间，违约率为19%，利率下降30个百分点使违约率下降2.5个百分点，对最新借款人没有影响。最低还款额翻倍使实验期间违约率上升0.8个百分点，但实验后违约率下降1个百分点，可能是由于债务减少。将实验样本与其正式就业历史匹配后，我们发现，工作分离对违约的影响——在新借款人中更为常见——是30个百分点利率变化影响的七倍。我们提供了一个解释实验结果的简单框架，并将合同条款影响较小归因于其对现金流的有限影响，而非每比索影响的差异。

articles.title_en: Structural Change, Land Use and Urban Expansion
articles.title_cn: 结构性变革、土地利用与城市扩张
articles.abstract_en: Abstract How do cities grow in the process of structural transformation? To answer this question, we develop a multi-sector spatial equilibrium model with endogenous land use: land is used either for agriculture or housing. Urban land, densely populated due to commuting frictions, expands out of agricultural land. With low productivity and high subsistence needs, farmland is expensive, households cannot afford large homes and cities are very dense. Increasing productivity reallocates factors away from agriculture, freeing up land for urban expansion and limiting the increase in land values despite higher income and urban population. With the area of cities growing faster than urban population, urban density can persistently decline, as in the data over a long period. The quantitative evaluation calibrated to historical data assembled for France over 180 years explains a large fraction of the joint evolution of urban areas, population density and land values across time and space.
articles.abstract_cn: 摘要 城市在结构性转型过程中如何增长？为回答这一问题，我们构建了一个多部门空间均衡模型，具有内生土地利用：土地被用于农业或住房。由于通勤摩擦，城市土地人口密集，并从农业用地扩展。生产率低且生存需求高时，农田价格昂贵，家庭无法负担大面积住房，城市非常密集。生产率提高将要素从农业部门重新配置，释放土地用于城市扩张，并在收入和城市人口增加的情况下限制土地价值的上升。随着城市面积增长快于城市人口，城市密度可以持续下降，这与长期数据一致。通过对法国180年历史数据的定量评估，模型解释了城市面积、人口密度和土地价值在时间和空间上的联合演变的大部分。

articles.title_en: What’s My Employee Worth? The Effects of Salary Benchmarking
articles.title_cn: 我的员工值多少钱？薪酬基准的影响
articles.abstract_en: Abstract Firms are allowed to use aggregate data on market salaries to set pay, a practice known as salary benchmarking. Using national payroll data, we study firms that gain access to a tool that reveals market benchmarks for each job title. Using a difference-in-differences design, we find that the benchmark information reduces salary dispersion by 25%. Thus, salary dispersion must stem partly from aggregate uncertainty about the salaries offered by other firms. Our model formalizes how salary dispersion can arise even in competitive labour markets for identical workers when such uncertainty exists, and we discuss implications for an ongoing policy debate.
articles.abstract_cn: 摘要 企业被允许使用市场薪酬的汇总数据来设定工资，这一做法被称为薪酬基准。利用全国工资单数据，我们研究了获得一项工具的企业，该工具能够显示每个职位的市场基准。采用双重差分设计，我们发现基准信息使薪酬离散度降低了25%。因此，薪酬离散度部分源于对其他企业所提供薪酬的总体不确定性。我们的模型形式化地说明了即使在对同质劳动者的竞争性劳动力市场中，只要存在这种不确定性，薪酬离散度也会出现，并讨论了这一发现对当前政策讨论的影响。

articles.title_en: Normalizations and Misspecification in Skill Formation Models
articles.title_cn: 技能形成模型中的归一化与模型设定错误
articles.abstract_en: Abstract An important class of structural models studies the determinants of skill formation and the optimal timing of interventions. In this article, I provide new identification results for these models and investigate the effects of seemingly innocuous scale and location restrictions on parameters of interest. To do so, I first characterize the identified set of all parameters without these additional restrictions and show that important policy-relevant parameters are point identified under weaker assumptions than commonly used in the literature. The implications of imposing standard scale and location restrictions depend on how the model is specified, but they generally impact the interpretation of parameters and may affect counterfactuals. Importantly, with the popular constant elasticity of substitution (CES) production function, commonly used scale restrictions fix identified parameters and lead to misspecification. Consequently, simply changing the units of measurements of observed variables might yield ineffective investment strategies and misleading policy recommendations. I show how existing estimators can easily be adapted to solve these issues. As a byproduct, this article also presents a general and formal definition of when restrictions are truly normalizations.
articles.abstract_cn: 结构模型的重要一类研究技能形成的决定因素及干预的最优时机。本文为这些模型提供了新的识别结果，并考察了对感兴趣参数施加看似无害的尺度和位置限制的影响。为此，首先刻画了在没有这些额外限制时所有参数的识别集合，并展示了在比文献中常用假设更弱的条件下，重要的政策相关参数可以被点识别。施加标准尺度和位置限制的影响取决于模型的具体设定，但通常会影响参数的解释，并可能影响反事实分析。重要的是，在广泛使用的常数替代弹性（CES）生产函数下，常用的尺度限制会固定识别参数并导致模型设定错误。因此，仅仅改变观测变量的计量单位可能导致无效的投资策略和误导性的政策建议。本文展示了现有估计量如何可以轻松调整以解决这些问题。作为副产品，本文还提出了关于何时限制是真正归一化的一般且正式的定义。

articles.title_en: To Own or to Rent? The Effects of Transaction Taxes on Housing Markets
articles.title_cn: 拥有还是租赁？交易税对住房市场的影响
articles.abstract_en: Abstract Using sales and leasing data, this paper finds three novel effects of a higher property transaction tax: higher buy-to-rent transactions alongside lower buy-to-own transactions despite both being taxed, a lower sales-to-leases ratio, and a lower price-to-rent ratio. This paper explains these facts by developing a search model with entry of investors and households, households choosing to own or rent in the presence of credit frictions, and homeowners deciding when to move house. A higher transaction tax reduces homeowners’ mobility and increases demand for rental properties, which explains the empirical facts and leads to a lower homeownership rate. The deadweight loss is large at 111% of tax revenue, with more than half of this due to distorting decisions to own or rent.
articles.abstract_cn: 摘要 本文利用销售和租赁数据，发现更高的房地产交易税有三项新颖影响：尽管买入出租和买入自住交易都被征税，但买入出租交易增加而买入自住交易减少，销售与租赁比率下降，以及价格与租金比率下降。本文通过构建一个包含投资者和家庭进入、家庭在信贷摩擦下选择拥有或租赁、以及业主决定何时搬家的搜索模型来解释这些事实。更高的交易税降低了业主的流动性并增加了对租赁物业的需求，这解释了实证事实并导致自有住房率下降。无谓损失高达税收收入的111%，其中超过一半源于对拥有或租赁决策的扭曲。

articles.title_en: Slum Upgrading and Long-Run Urban Development: Evidence from Indonesia
articles.title_cn: 棚户区改造与长期城市发展：来自印度尼西亚的证据
articles.abstract_en: Abstract Developing countries face massive urbanization and slum upgrading is a popular policy to improve shelter for many. Yet, preserving slums at the expense of formal developments can raise concerns of misallocation of land. We estimate causal, long-term impacts of the 1969–84 KIP programme, which provided basic upgrades to 5 million residents covering 25% of land in Jakarta, Indonesia. We assemble high-resolution data on programme boundaries and 2015 outcomes and address programme selection bias through localized comparisons. On average, KIP areas today have lower land values, shorter buildings, and are more informal, per a photographs-based slum index. The negative effects are concentrated within 5 km of the CBD. We develop a spatial equilibrium model to characterize the welfare implications of KIP. Counterfactuals suggest that 79% of the welfare effects stem from removing KIP in the centre and highlight how to mitigate losses to displaced residents.
articles.abstract_cn: 发展中国家面临大规模城市化，棚户区改造是改善众多居民住房条件的常用政策。然而，以牺牲正规开发为代价保留棚户区，可能引发土地资源错配的担忧。我们估计了1969–84年KIP项目的因果长期影响，该项目为印度尼西亚雅加达5百万居民、覆盖25%土地提供了基础设施升级。我们收集了项目边界和2015年结果的高分辨率数据，并通过局部比较方法解决了项目选择偏差。平均来看，KIP区域目前土地价值较低，建筑物较矮，并且根据基于照片的棚户区指数显示更为非正规化。负面影响主要集中在距离中央商务区5公里范围内。我们构建了空间均衡模型以刻画KIP的福利影响。反事实分析表明，79%的福利效应来自于取消中心城区的KIP，并强调了如何缓解被迁居民的损失。

articles.title_en: Sanctions and the Exchange Rate
articles.title_cn: 制裁与汇率
articles.abstract_en: Abstract Trade wars and financial sanctions are again becoming an increasingly common part of the international economic landscape, and the dynamics of the exchange rate are often used in real time to evaluate the effectiveness of sanctions and policy responses. We show that sanctions limiting a country’s exports or freezing its assets depreciate the exchange rate, while sanctions limiting imports appreciate it, even when both types of policies have exactly the same effect on real allocations, including household welfare and government fiscal revenues. Beyond the direct effect from sanctions, increased precautionary savings in foreign currency also depreciate the exchange rate when they are not offset by the sale of official reserves or financial repression of foreign-currency savings. We show that the dynamics of the ruble exchange rate following Russia’s invasion of Ukraine in February 2022 are quantitatively consistent with the combined effects of these forces calibrated to the observed sanctions and government policies. We evaluate the associated welfare, fiscal and inflationary consequences for both Russia and the coalition of Western countries.
articles.abstract_cn: 贸易战和金融制裁再次成为国际经济格局中日益常见的部分，汇率动态常被实时用于评估制裁及政策反应的有效性。我们表明，限制一国出口或冻结其资产的制裁会导致汇率贬值，而限制进口的制裁则会导致汇率升值，即使这两类政策对实际配置（包括家庭福利和政府财政收入）的影响完全相同。除制裁的直接效应外，外币预防性储蓄的增加也会导致汇率贬值，前提是这一效应未被官方储备的抛售或对外币储蓄的金融抑制所抵消。我们表明，2022年二月俄罗斯入侵乌克兰后卢布汇率的动态，与根据观察到的制裁和政府政策校准的这些因素的综合效应在定量上是一致的。我们评估了相关的福利、财政和通胀后果，对俄罗斯及西方国家联盟均进行了分析。

articles.title_en: Taxes Depress Corporate Borrowing: Evidence from Private Firms
articles.title_cn: 税收抑制企业借贷：来自私营企业的证据
articles.abstract_en: Abstract We use variation in state corporate income tax rates to re-examine the relation between taxes and corporate leverage. Contrary to prior research, corporate leverage rises after tax cuts for small private firms. An estimated dynamic equilibrium model shows that tax cuts make capital more productive and spur the use of leverage. Tax cuts also produce more distant default thresholds and lower credit spreads. These effects outweigh the lower interest tax deduction and lead to higher optimal leverage choices, especially for firms with flexible investment policies. The presence of the interest tax deduction raises consumer welfare in equilibrium.
articles.abstract_cn: 我们利用州企业所得税率的差异，重新检验税收与企业杠杆率之间的关系。与以往研究相反，小型私营企业在减税后企业杠杆率上升。动态均衡模型估计结果显示，减税使资本更具生产力，并促进杠杆的使用。减税还导致违约门槛更远、信用利差更低。这些效应超过了利息税扣除减少的影响，并导致更高的最优杠杆选择，尤其是对于投资政策灵活的企业。利息税扣除的存在在均衡中提高了消费者福利。

articles.title_en: Supply Chain Disruption and Reorganization: Theory and Evidence From Ukraine’s War
articles.title_cn: 供应链中断与重组：来自乌克兰战争的理论与证据
articles.abstract_en: Abstract How do localized conflicts disrupt supply chains and prompt firms to reorganize them? How do these forces affect firm-level and aggregate economic activity? Using firm-to-firm Ukrainian railway-shipment data before and during the 2014 Russia–Ukraine conflict, we document that firms with prior supplier and buyer exposure to the conflict areas substantially decreased their output. Simultaneously, firms reorganized their production linkages away from partners directly or indirectly exposed to the conflict shock. We build a general-equilibrium production-network model with endogeneous link formation, and we show that our model’s sufficient statistics accurately explains the observed relative decline in firm output once we account for network reorganization. Calibrating our model to the Ukrainian economy, we find that the localized conflict decreased aggregate output in nonconflict areas by 5.5%. This effect increases to 8.4% if we abstract from endogeneous link formation, suggesting that production-network reorganization partially mitigates the detrimental, far-reaching aggregate economic costs of conflicts.
articles.abstract_cn: 摘要 局部冲突如何扰乱供应链并促使企业进行重组？这些力量如何影响企业层面和总体经济活动？我们利用乌克兰企业间铁路运输数据，涵盖2014年俄乌冲突前后，发现此前与冲突地区有供应商和买方联系的企业，其产出显著下降。同时，企业将生产联系从直接或间接暴露于冲突冲击的合作伙伴转移。我们构建了一个具有内生联系形成的一般均衡生产网络模型，并证明模型的充分统计量在考虑网络重组后，能够准确解释企业产出的相对下降。将模型校准到乌克兰经济后，我们发现局部冲突使非冲突地区的总体产出下降了5.5%。如果不考虑内生联系形成，这一影响将上升至8.4%，表明生产网络重组在一定程度上缓解了冲突带来的广泛且有害的总体经济成本。

articles.title_en: All Along the Watchtower: Military Landholders and Serfdom Consolidation in Early Modern Russia
articles.title_cn: 守望塔下：军事土地所有者与近代早期俄罗斯农奴制的巩固
articles.abstract_en: Abstract This article examines the emergence of coercive labour institutions using the case of serfdom in early modern Russia. We argue that serfdom consolidated under the pressure of landholding military elites who gained political influence due to the prolonged struggle with steppe nomads. To contain nomadic raids, the Russian state erected defence lines on the southern frontier, and granted land in the area to soldiers in charge of its defence. The soldiers could not farm while on defence duty, nor could they compete in the market for peasant labour, as the land had been selected for its defensive rather than agricultural value. The system was therefore only sustainable by restricting labour mobility. In response to the volume of landholders’ collective petitions, the Russian state gradually tied peasants to the land and institutionalized serfdom in the written law. Using newly digitized population data from the 17th century, we show a higher prevalence of serfs and military landholders in districts on the defence line. We also find a higher prevalence of small estates—up to 25 serf households—sufficient to support a soldier and his family. Placebo tests show that these patterns do not hold for non-serf peasants, or for merchants and artisans. To ensure causality, we develop a novel algorithm that reconstructs the optimal invasion routes for nomads and pinpoints the optimal location of the defence line using topographic data. Our results highlight the primacy of political economy factors over purely economic ones, such as the land–labour ratio or the grain trade, in the development of serfdom. This sheds new light on the possible mechanisms of institutional divergence between Eastern and Western Europe in the early modern period.
articles.abstract_cn: 摘要 本文以近代早期俄罗斯的农奴制为案例，考察强制性劳动制度的出现。我们认为，农奴制是在拥有土地的军事精英因与草原游牧民族的长期斗争而获得政治影响力的压力下巩固的。为遏制游牧民族的袭击，俄罗斯国家在南部边境修建防线，并将该地区的土地授予负责防御的士兵。士兵在服役期间无法耕种，也无法在农民劳动力市场中竞争，因为这些土地是基于防御价值而非农业价值选定的。因此，该体系只有通过限制劳动力流动才能维持。作为对土地所有者集体请愿数量的回应，俄罗斯国家逐步将农民束缚于土地，并在成文法中将农奴制制度化。利用新近数字化的17世纪人口数据，我们显示防线地区的农奴和军事土地所有者比例更高。我们还发现小型庄园（最多25户农奴家庭）更为普遍，这足以养活一名士兵及其家属。安慰剂检验显示，这些模式并不适用于非农奴农民、商人和手工业者。为确保因果关系，我们开发了一种新算法，利用地形数据重建游牧民族的最优入侵路线，并精确定位防线的最优位置。我们的结果强调了政治经济因素在农奴制发展中的首要地位，而非土地—劳动力比或谷物贸易等纯经济因素。这为解释近代早期东西欧制度分化的可能机制提供了新视角。

articles.title_en: Patents, News, and Business Cycles
articles.title_cn: 专利、新闻与经济周期
articles.abstract_en: Abstract We exploit information in patent applications to construct an instrumental variable for the identification of technology news shocks that relaxes all the identifying assumptions traditionally used in the literature. The instrument recovers news shocks that have no effect on aggregate productivity in the short-run, but are a significant driver of its trend component. The shock prompts a broad-based expansion in anticipation of the future increase in total factor productivity (TFP), with output, consumption, and investment all rising well before any material increase in TFP is recorded. Despite the positive conditional comovements, the shock only accounts for a modest share of fluctuations of macroeconomic aggregates at business cycle frequencies. Financial markets price-in news shocks on impact, while most of the macro aggregates respond with some delay.
articles.abstract_cn: 我们利用专利申请中的信息构建了一个技术新闻冲击的工具变量，该变量放宽了文献中传统使用的所有识别假设。该工具变量识别出的新闻冲击在短期内对总体生产率没有影响，但却显著推动了其趋势成分。该冲击促使经济主体广泛扩张，预期未来全要素生产率（TFP）将提升，产出、消费和投资在TFP实际增加之前就已上升。尽管条件下的相关性为正，该冲击仅能解释宏观经济总量在经济周期频率上的波动的一小部分。金融市场在冲击发生时即刻计入新闻冲击，而大多数宏观总量则有一定滞后反应。
